name: @illusions-lab/mdi-core
description: wasm bindings for mdi-core, the language-neutral MDI 2.0 syntax core

scripts.build: cd ../../../mdi-core && PATH="/opt/homebrew/opt/rustup/bin:$PATH" wasm-pack build --release --target nodejs --out-dir ../nodejs/packages/mdi-core/dist -- --features wasm && node -e "require('node:fs').rmSync('../nodejs/packages/mdi-core/dist/.gitignore', { force: true })"
